text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, do you have a minute? Thing is,<n>I have a
test tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But today, I realized that I messed up,<n>and the
material I've been studying<n>won't be on the test.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: So you know what I have to do now,<n>right?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yep! Go right into the test with no<n>preparation!
Problem solved!
